Source: Amazon Q Developer Doc History
URL: https://docs.aws.amazon.com/amazonq/latest/qdeveloper-ug/doc-history.html
Fetched: 2026-03-19

# Amazon Q Developer - Document History

## February 2026
- Feb 18: Maximum subscription limit increased from 10 to 20 accounts per AWS Region per organization

## January 2026
- Jan 16: Deprecated code transformation for GitLab (Java modernization)
- Jan 13: Removed deprecated GitLab quick actions (/q dev, /q test)

## December 2025
- Dec 29: GitHub feature development now uses conversation-based feedback with /q command
- Dec 18: Updated GitHub app installation for Kiro and Amazon Q Developer shared console
- Dec 15: Deprecated code transformation for GitHub (Java modernization)

## November 2025
- Nov 17: Q CLI officially rebranded as Kiro CLI

## October 2025
- Oct 29: Updated managed policies (AmazonQFullAccess, AmazonQDeveloperAccess)
- Oct 21: Removed IDE agent documentation; agentic chat replaces /dev, /doc, /test, /review agents
- Oct 21: Added IDE memory bank documentation
- Oct 3: Added Q CLI feature documentation for agents, prompt management

## Security & Policy Updates
- KMS permissions expanded (kms:Decrypt, kms:DescribeKey, kms:Encrypt, kms:GenerateDataKey)
- Managed policies regularly updated
- Data encryption for customer-managed keys
- Enhanced proxy configuration across IDEs
